name: Peanut Butter Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first four ingredients together until well combined.
2. Shape the mixture into 1-inch balls. They can also be shaped into logs.
3. Melt the chocolate chips and grated Parowax in a small heavy saucepan over low heat.
4. Dip each ball (or log) into the melted chocolate and wax mixture.
5. Allow the dipped balls to drain on waxed paper before placing them back onto the paper to cool.
6. Let the peanut butter balls cool and harden completely.
7. ENJOY!
